description: Net Pressure (TP) pipeline config. Per-protocol source paths for the daily flow components. v1 supports HYPE; AAVE/SKY/LIT will be added as their on-chain adapters land.
notes: Net Pressure = (Unlocks + Treasury Sells) − (Buybacks + Burns + Treasury accumulation + Net staking lockups)
Components without an on-chain source are computed as 0 with verification: 'n/a' — the formula is correct, the gap is documented.
Treasury accumulation is intentionally 0 for HYPE: the AF is the buyback wallet (already counted as buybacks), not a separate treasury wallet. Counting both would double-count.

treasury_accumulation.note: AF is buyback_wallet not treasury_wallet — already counted as buybacks

net_staking_lockups.note: Daily snapshots accumulate over time. Until ≥2 snapshots exist, delta=0 for historical days. Static stock figure surfaced in the report's reference section.
